properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 110/17
1. POLAR EMPRESS CONDUCTING SEISMIC OPERATION, 
TOWING CABLES 6 KM LENGTH IN AN AREA BOUND BY
A. 70- 46 N 020- 13 E
B. 72- 54 N 020- 13 E
C. 72- 54 N 025- 31 E
D. 71- 25 N 025- 31 E
E. 71- 21 N 023- 45 E

REQUIRE MINIMUM CPA 3 NM AHEAD AND SIDES, 5 NM ASTERN
GUARD VESSEL SANCO SKY AND ANDREA IN ATTENDANCE
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 43/17
